name: Votorantim Securities Master Fundo Investimento Imobiliario Fii
summary: Votorantim Securities Master Fundo de Investimento Imobiliario FII is a Brazilian real estate investment fund focused on generating income through investments in real estate assets. The fund's objective is to provide returns to investors through rental income and capital appreciation of its real estate holdings. The fund is managed and administered by Votorantim Asset Management, a financial institution in Brazil.
